<?php class HTMLPurifier_URIFilter_DisableResources extends HTMLPurifier_URIFilter { /** * @type string */ public $name = 'DisableResources'; /** * @param HTMLPurifier_URI $uri * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config * @param HTMLPurifier_Context $context * @return bool */ public function filter(&$uri, $config, $context) { return !$context->get('EmbeddedURI', true); } } // vim: et sw=4 sts=4
